item.title: SPIKE: Mermaid WKWebView Memory Impact
item.intent: Validate the offscreen WKWebView approach for Mermaid rendering and measure memory impact with multiple diagrams
item.description: Prototype Mermaid diagram rendering using mermaid.js in an offscreen WKWebView. Render SVG output, convert to cached UIImage. Measure memory usage with 1, 5, and 10 diagrams in a single document. Test cache invalidation on content change. Test theme switching (light/dark). Evaluate WKWebView lifecycle (create/destroy vs reuse). Blocks FEAT-030 (Mermaid Rendering). Updates architecture decision [A-006].
acceptanceCriteria: Prototype renders at least 3 Mermaid diagram types (flowchart, sequence, ER)
Memory usage measured with 1, 5, and 10 diagrams
Architecture decision [A-006] updated based on findings
